name: Strong Visual Change: Covered → Lightly Covered
description: Phase 0 starts covered. Phase 1 stays somewhat covered but visibly lighter/more revealing. Color may change; strong visual change is preferred.

0.query: Bild 1 before drop: full-body standing person wearing a covered outfit with clear fabric and clothing coverage
must: full body photo showing the entire person head to toe
standing upright pose matching the reference video
covered outfit with clear fabric coverage, jacket, dress, pants, sleeves, or layered clothing
avoid: cropped close-up or partial body shot
very revealing outfit with minimal fabric

1.query: Bild 2 after drop: full-body standing person with a clearly changed outfit that is lighter or more revealing but still an outfit
must: full body photo showing the entire person head to toe
standing upright pose matching the reference video
lighter outfit or more open outfit than Bild 1, some exposed skin, less fabric than before
still covered enough to look like a complete outfit, not underwear only
avoid: cropped close-up or partial body shot
extremely revealing underwear-only or nude look

relations.name: coverage
positive: covered outfit, lots of fabric, layered clothing, covered body
negative: revealing outfit, exposed skin, minimal fabric, open clothing

relations.name: revealing
positive: revealing outfit, exposed skin, less fabric, open clothing
negative: fully covered outfit, lots of fabric, jacket, dress, layered clothing

pair_reranker.query: Choose the best before/after outfit transformation pair. IMAGE 1 must be full-body, standing, and clearly covered. IMAGE 2 must also be full-body and standing, still look like a complete outfit, but be visibly lighter/more revealing than IMAGE 1. Prefer a strong visual change: color may change, silhouette may change, and fabric coverage should decrease. Reject lying/sitting/cropped images and reject extremely nude or underwear-only looks.
